author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Shaft Produces 'Seibetsu "Mona Lisa" no Kimi e.' TV Anime Adaptation
Production company CyberAgent opened an official website for a television anime adaptation Tsumuji Yoshimura's Seibetsu "Mona Lisa" no Kimi e. (Just Like Mona Lisa) manga on Wednesday. The website revealed a teaser visual (pictured) and Shaft as the animation studio. The main cast and teaser promotional video will be revealed at the AnimagiC 2026 convention on August 1. Yoshimura began writing the romance manga on Square Enix's Gangan Online web magazine in May 2018. Square E...

text:
'Kashita Maryoku wa "Revo Barai" de Kyousei Choushuu' Reveals Main Cast, Additional Staff, First Promo for Fall 2026
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Masakichi and Shingou Iijima's Kashita Maryoku wa "Revo Barai" de Kyousei Choushuu (Magic Repo Man: Dumped by My Party, I'll Cash In With a Cute Support Fairy to Become the Strongest!) web manga revealed the main cast, additional staff, and first promotional video on Wednesday.
